svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="PRD 三档章节组合" id="prd-tiers"> <mxGraphModel dx="-529" dy="-166" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="PRD 该写多厚?看这三个问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="360" x="320" y="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="START" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="这个需求
涉及几个端?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="420" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="有没有
状态流转?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="420" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="要不要
算商业账?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="420" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="SMALL" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="小功能档

背景目标 · 范围 · 角色 · 功能清单
(单端 / 1-2 页 / 无状态流转)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="280" x="60" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="MID" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="中等模块档

加:价值指标 · 用户画像 · 核心流程
(跨端 / 3-8 页 / 有核心流程)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="290" x="660" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LARGE" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="大型产品级(全部 15 章按需取舍)

价值主张 · ROI · 竞品 · 状态机
埋点 · 发布回滚 · 决策记录
(跨多端 / 复杂状态 / 商业价值)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="320" x="350" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="START" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="SMALL" value="0-1 个"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="START" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="MID" value="≥2 个"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;" target="SMALL" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="START" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;" target="Q2" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;" target="Q3" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="MID" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=1;" target="LARGE" value="是 → 三个都沾边"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
